hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams escalate and manage high-risk destination of funds scenarios by connecting transaction data, wallet risk, and provider outputs into auditable review workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Destination risk reviews depend on manual checks
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and gaps when destination-of-funds risk signals remain isolated across multiple KYT and transaction monitoring tools. This fragmentation slows case escalation, weakens audit evidence, and hinders consistent decision-making for high-risk destination reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links destination-of-funds risk indicators from KYT providers into structured cases with enriched wallet and transaction context, enabling compliance teams to escalate, review and document high-risk scenarios efficiently.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to destination review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals and transaction data to initiate destination reviews, supporting case creation, evidence collection and compliance decision workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYT provider outputs into structured reviews, case workflows, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for efficient destination-of-funds risk escalation.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing high-risk destination cases with structured provider outputs, audit-ready evidence and controlled workflows for bank and enterprise compliance needs.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for destination risk review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures destination of funds risk signals into workflow cases, helping VASPs and compliance teams review high-risk destinations efficiently within a connected compliance environment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle destination risk cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes high-risk destination alerts into cases, links related transactions and wallets, tracks reviewer decisions, and supports escalation and reporting within a controlled compliance process.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete evidence history for each case, including wallet and transaction data, alerts, review logs and decisions, providing audit-ready records for regulatory or internal inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple KYT, wallet risk and screening providers, consolidating their signals into one coordinated compliance workflow without disrupting existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts above existing KYT and screening providers, turning their outputs into structured workflows without replacing the underlying provider or analytics platforms.
final_title: Structure high-risk destination reviews with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects transaction data, wallet risk and provider outputs into structured cases for destination of funds compliance.
